rationale: The 2005 Jedidi and Kohli paper is cited only in grouped literature-review citations that list prior non-compensatory/decompositional decision-rule models. In the body of the paper, the authors do not build their proposed UDE method directly on that specific model, reuse its estimation procedure, or test an explicit extension/refinement/challenge of it. The citation mainly serves as background positioning for the broader non-compensatory modeling stream rather than a distinct functional input to this study.
